loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing aggregate panel event counts; some panel members (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11, GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7) are dark and do not report live data.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing narrative summary for 6 active feeders; 2 supply incomers and 2 UPS feeders are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-member event distribution for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current distribution for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and will render as blank spokes.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel voltage/current events and metrics for active feeders (UPS-01, UPS-02, UPS-03, BPDB-01, BPDB-02, UPS-04); inactive feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06, Solar Incomers, Transformers) are honest-blanked as they have no data.
